---
title: "Registration"
---

::: {style="font-size: 3rem; text-align: center;"}
:::
Welcome to the Research Software Africa 2026. 

### Call for Volunteers
[Register here](https://forms.gle/Vd8yEZVxvzki8Ppc8) to serve as a volunteer during the conference

### Register for the Conference
[Register here](https://forms.gle/Vd8yEZVxvzki8Ppc8) to attend the conference
